subcodes.first_line: Hallowed praise, transcending all exaltation and loftiness, all mention and utterance, all description and exposition, pertaineth unto the most sanctified, most holy and most exalted Presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از علو و سمو و ذکر و بیان و وصف و تبیان ساحت امنع اقدس ارفع حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
